notes: Phase A evidence scenario for openai/gpt-oss-120b via mlx_lm_delegated (PRD: GPT-OSS-SUPPORT-PRD.md, W1.3). DOES NOT EXECUTE under ax-engine-bench scenario today: same BackendAdapterManifest gap as chat_gpt_oss_20b_short.json (see that manifest's notes). Retained as a documentation artifact for when an MlxLmServerCompletion adapter variant lands. Output target shorter than 20B to bound wall time. Companion runbook: ../../../.internal/planning/GPT-OSS-PHASE-A-RUNBOOK.md.
